title: Simply Musk Fragrance Oil - 10ml Suitable for Candles, Soaps, Slime, diffusers, Cosmetics, Wax Melts
features: Supplied in 10ml amber glass bottle with dropper and cap
MSDS & IFRA cert available on request
Fragrance oils are completely synthetic, and they should not be confused with Essential Oils.
Suitable In Soaps, Candles, Oil Burners, Wax Melts, Bath Salts, Bath Bombs, Slime, Cosmetic Products.
Our fragrance oils are produced to deliver an imitation scent reminiscent of a certain product, perfume, fruit, food, etc.
description: Product description A soft musk fragrance with notes of musk mallow, benozoin and tonka. Directions For candles: Add 10-15 drops to 100g of wax. For soaps: Add 1% of the total weight of the soap. For diffusers: Add 5-10 drops to water. Not for ingestion or topical application. Safety Warning May cause skin irritation. Avoid contact with eyes and mouth. Keep out of reach of children. Do not ingest. Use in a well-ventilated area. Avoid heating or exposing to high temperatures. Store in a cool, dry place away from light. See more
